name: seal
description: Plan-to-launch rigor for Codex using local SEAL artifacts with visible evidence, authority, gaps, and launch readiness.

interface.shortDescription: Map plans and repositories into traceable local launch-readiness artifacts.
interface.longDescription: SEAL helps Codex inspect a repository or Markdown plan and produce local ONTOLOGY, MAP, IMPACT, PROVE, evidence, gap, and launch-readiness artifacts without hiding weak authority or unknowns.
defaultPrompt: Use SEAL to map this repository.
Use SEAL to inspect this plan.
Use SEAL to check launch readiness.
